title: Owncast
description: Self-hosted live video streaming and chat server, a free and open-source alternative to services like Twitch.
installation: Owncast stores all state (SQLite database, config, uploaded logos/emojis, and HLS video segments) under /app/data, so no external datastore add-on is required; the persistent volume is mandatory. On first run open the web UI, then visit Admin (/admin, default login admin / abc123) and immediately change the stream key and admin password. Point your broadcasting software (OBS, etc.) at rtmp://<host>:1935/live using your stream key. For production scale you may offload HLS segments to S3-compatible object storage and front it with a CDN, configured in the admin Storage settings (not an operator add-on).
